creator: ports@thelanman.net
text:
On systems that require both python2 and python3 the current:

USES=           python:3.3+

doesn't honor the python3 DEFAULT_VERSIONS, so if one is using Python 3.5 via:
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= python2=2.7 python3=3.5

then you end up with both 3.4 (the python: default) and 3.5.

So, can the USES= be changed to:
USES=           python3:3.3+


thanks.
